title: lobelia erinus var. microdon
intro: Lobelia erinus var. microdon, also known as dwarf blue lobelia, is a compact and delicate flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Lobelia erinus var. microdon include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, while also providing relief from muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Lobelia erinus var. microdon include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
